name: Create Animal Classification Chart
description: Create a 3-page interactive flipchart for a 6th-grade science lesson on Animal Classification. The first page must feature the title "Animal Classification" and introductory text for "Vertebrates" and "Invertebrates". The second page must contain a visual classification tree starting with "Animals" branching into "Vertebrates" (listing at least 4 classes) and "Invertebrates" (listing at least 2 classes), using at least 8 rectangle shapes to categorize the groups. The third page must include a "Sort the Animals" activity with at least 6 animals selected from: Eagle, Salmon, Frog, Spider, Snail, Cobra, Butterfly, Dolphin, Beetle, and Turtle. Save the flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/animal_classification.flipchart.
